cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Check that you use wined3d11. Install d3dcompiler_47 (protontricks 99300 d3dcompiler_47) After that game runs nice and smooth.
title: Renegade Ops

notes: Like the other poster mentioned, enable D3d11 and install d3dcompiler_47 (protontricks 99300 d3dcompiler_47).  Played for about 30 minutes of mission 4, no issues.
title: Renegade Ops

notes: Enable D3d11 with PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 and install d3dcompiler "protontricks 99300 d3dcompiler_47" (or "protontricks 99300 d3dcompiler_43" , in case you have problems with 47, like it happen to me for some weird reason). After that the game works same as windows
title: Renegade Ops

notes:
I used protontricks to install d3dcompiler_43 and d3dcompiler_47. No launch options used.

Using Steam Controller and controller config set to "Gamepad with Camera Controls" and right trackpad set to "Joystick Move".
title: Renegade Ops
